introSection: Van Helsing's Factory is a steel enclosed roller coaster located at Movie Park Germany in Bottrop, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Van Helsing's Factory is a Bobsled Coaster from Gerstlauer. It is themed around the film Van Helsing.

fullText:
Van Helsing's Factory is a steel enclosed roller coaster located at Movie Park Germany in Bottrop, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany.

Van Helsing's Factory is a Bobsled Coaster from Gerstlauer. It is themed around the film Van Helsing.
